title: lantana camara f. mista
intro: Lantana camara f. mista is a variety of the lantana shrub, known for its compact growth habit and vibrant purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and reduce fever. The medicinal properties of lantana camara f. mista have been found to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and even exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of lantana camara f. mista can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in tinctures and ointments.
